claim: Explorer claim about missing stress testing evidence is BLOCKED by contradiction: comprehensive real-world Claude stress testing exists with 143+ iterations, 8 scenario types, and full provider/boundary/evidence validation.

evidence.summary: Real Claude stress testing tool spawns claude -p agents with 8 scenarios including local-contract-boundary, research-fetch-boundary, evidence-scope-contract, json-output-resilience, git-untracked-boundary, real-boundary-mutation-probe, readiness-missing-clarify, provider-profile-drift
evidence.why: Proves real stress testing infrastructure exists and is actively used.

evidence.summary: Stress test ledger shows 15 real Claude -p agent iterations with actual provider runs, exit codes, timeouts, boundary violations, and evidence results for all 8 scenarios
evidence.why: Direct evidence of real-world Claude agent execution results.

evidence.summary: Provider runs show provider=claude with real exit_code=0, success=true, timed_out=false confirming actual Claude CLI execution
evidence.why: Confirms these are real provider executions not mocks.

evidence.summary: Real boundary mutation probe test shows boundary=violated, BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blocker for src/boundary-probe.txt write, confirming boundary enforcement works with real agents
evidence.why: Proves boundary enforcement was stress-tested with real writes.

evidence.summary: Provider-profile-drift scenario passed with explorer, cross-checker, verifier all completing with evidence counts 13/14/4, confirming provider isolation works with real agents
evidence.why: Shows provider dispatch works correctly with real Claude agents.

evidence.summary: 258 evidence dispatch artifacts exist in .yolo/demand/evidence/ proving extensive real-world usage
evidence.why: Volume of artifacts proves this is heavily used not theoretical.

evidence.summary: 4 stress test run directories exist with claude-stress-20260601091613646 (15 iters), claude-stress-20260601081349254 (10 iters), claude-stress-20260601055041525 (43+ iters), claude-stress-20260601035332471 (75+ iters)
evidence.why: Multiple stress test runs show ongoing validation over time.

evidence.summary: 66 modified files confirm dirty working tree claim
evidence.why: Confirms the dirty tree aspect of explorer claim is accurate.

risks: Explorer missed .yolo/stress/ directories which contain extensive real-world testing evidence, leading to incorrect assumption that no stress testing exists.

result.notes: BLOCKER CONFLICT RESOLVED: Explorer claimed no stress testing evidence exists, but cross-check found 143+ real stress test iterations across 4 runs with actual Claude -p agent executions proving provider dispatch, boundary enforcement, and evidence protocols all work correctly. The dirty working tree claim is confirmed accurate. Comprehensive real-world validation evidence exists contradicting the explorer missing claim.
